ContestController.ContestState","name":"","type":"uint8"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"bytes4","name":"interfaceId","type":"bytes4"}],"name":"supportsInterface","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"totalSecondaryLiquidity","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"sum","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"name":"uri","outputs":[{"internalType":"string","name":"","type":"string"}],"stateMutability":"pure","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"details":"Layer 1: primary prize pool (deposit minus optional subsidy carve). Layer 2: per-entry bonding      curve; each buy credits `secondaryLiquidityPerEntry[entryId]` (backed) for OPEN/CANCELLED      sell-back pricing. Primary carve credits `secondaryPrimarySubsidyPerEntry[entryId]` (unbacked);      sell-backs use backed liquidity only.      On settlement, all per-entry secondary balances are merged into `secondaryLiquidityPerEntry[secondaryWinningEntry]`      so winning-entry ERC1155 holders redeem pro-rata against the full secondary TVL (or it spills to primary payouts      if there is no supply on the winning entry). Each secondary buy credits liquidity and mints ERC1155 to the caller per the bonding curve from the entry's current nonnegative supply.","kind":"dev","methods":{"setApprovalForAll(address,bool)":{"details":"Secondary ERC1155 shares are accounting-only; only contest mint/burn paths may change balances."}},"stateVariables":{"entryIndexPlusOne":{"details":"Index in `entries` plus one; zero means not currently active."},"secondaryDepositedPerEntry":{"details":"Updated on secondary buys and reduced pro-rata on sells; not used for pricing."},"secondaryLiquidityPerEntry":{"details":"After SETTLE, per-entry backed + subsidy are merged into the winning entry's slot for redemption setApprovalForAll(address,bool).details: Secondary ERC1155 shares are accounting-only; only contest mint/burn paths may change balances.

MAX_ENTRIES().notice: Hard cap on concurrently active primary entries (settlement/close iterate `entries[]`)

calculateSecondaryPrice(uint256).notice: Marginal bonding-curve price for `entryId` from current net ERC1155 supply

distributeReferralFee(address,uint256).notice: Referral fee distribution (self-call target for try/catch in `settleContest`)

paySecondaryClaimExternal(address,uint25.notice: Self-call target so a single push recipient failure does not revert the batch

paymentTokenDecimals().notice: ERC20 decimals of `paymentToken` (used to normalize secondary buys into 18-dec share units)

primaryDepositSecondarySubsidyBps().notice: BPS of each primary deposit credited to `secondaryPrimarySubsidyPerEntry` (no ERC1155 mint)

removeSecondaryPosition(uint256,uint256).notice: Pro-rata sell-back of secondary tokens (OPEN or CANCELLED only)

secondaryDepositedPerEntry(address,uint2.notice: Attributed invested principal per token holder per entry (used by frontend UI)

secondaryLiquidityPerEntry(uint256).notice: Payment token backing this entry's secondary ERC1155 (secondary buy/sell only; sell-backs are pro-rata on this bucket while OPEN/CANCELLED)

secondaryPrimarySubsidyPerEntry(uint256).notice: Primary-sourced secondary TVL on this entry (no share backing; not used for OPEN/CANCELLED sell-backs)

totalSecondaryLiquidity().notice: Sum of backed (`secondaryLiquidityPerEntry`) plus primary subsidy per active entry
